name: Job Interview
description: Structured behavioral and situational interview coaching

phases.name: Rapport Building
phases.guidance: Build connection. Be concise but personable in your introduction.

phases.name: Behavioral Questions
phases.guidance: Use STAR format: Situation, Task, Action, Result. Be specific with numbers.

phases.name: Technical/Role Fit
phases.guidance: Demonstrate structured thinking. Walk through your approach step by step.

phases.name: Culture Fit
phases.guidance: Show self-awareness and growth mindset. Give honest, reflective answers.

phases.name: Candidate Questions
phases.guidance: Ask thoughtful questions about the role, team, and company direction.

outputFormat: 2-4 coaching bullets on what to say or ask next
